message:
feat(core): implement dynamic model creation (bd-2z7a)

Add DynamicModel for runtime-defined table schemas:

- DynamicModel struct with table name, columns, and values
- ColumnDef builder with nullable/primary_key/auto_increment/default
- get/set/remove/has value operations
- to_insert_pairs() for INSERT statement building
- primary_key_values() and primary_key_columns()
- from_row()/new_from_row() for populating from database rows
- Unit tests and doctest

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
